jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NABARD
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
